prompt: In a good powerlifting program, how much training time should be hypertrophy-focused, and how should that change with training age and in-season vs off-season? Also, when is someone strong enough to start bodybuilding-style accessory work?
assertions: States newer/less advanced lifters generally need more hypertrophy-focused training
Recommends learning the lifts first, then building muscle to fill out a weight class
Notes the shift toward more specific strength work as lifters advance
States hypertrophy emphasis should drop near meets (roughly last 4 weeks)
Mentions that adherence/enjoyment of training matters for long-term outcomes
